workflows.name: manual_summarize_document
workflows.description: Summarize one source document into structured markdown and JSON deliverables.

workflows.name: manual_compare_documents
workflows.description: Compare two documents and produce deterministic deltas with review notes.

workflows.name: manual_extract_risks
workflows.description: Extract risks and controls from a single input into structured output.

workflows.name: manual_runtime_validation
workflows.description: Manual Phase 1 runtime validation with durable evidence logs (Ollama + Open WebUI).

workflows.name: ci_operator_surface_summary
workflows.description: CI operator surface summary emitted under runs/_operator_surface/ci_last with canonical envelope artifacts.

workflows.name: wf_summarize_markdown
workflows.description: Deterministic extractive summary of a markdown document (headings + bullets + executive summary).

workflows.name: wf_compare_markdown
workflows.description: Deterministic unified diff between two markdown/text documents.

workflows.name: wf_extract_risk_lines
workflows.description: Deterministic extraction of risk-ish lines using keyword heuristics.

workflows.name: wf_financial_markdown_delta
workflows.description: Deterministic two-period financial markdown delta: unified diff plus diff lines matching financial materiality heuristics.
